integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenClinica EDC system via a web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser being used to navigate OpenClinica, not terminal commands making API requests.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation to change the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands, psql, or scripts directly updating the OpenClinica database.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's UI to trigger the audit trail.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reason for change must be entered into the OpenClinica discrepancy/audit dialog boxes, not just written in a separate text file or bypassed.
